navigation.check: DonorTrust navigation bar present with Audit tab active
navigation.details: Audit tab highlighted with blue bottom border

navigation_tabs.check: All navigation tabs visible (Upload, Imports, Review, Matches, People, Households, Exports, Audit)

page_title.check: Page title 'Audit Log (v1 Final)' present and prominent

page_description.text: Comprehensive activity tracking for the current import batch. Maintain institutional donor integrity through verified human-in-the-loop actions for DonorTrust v1.

left_sidebar.check: Left sidebar (Data Controls) visible with filters

filter_controls.check: All filter controls present (Action Type, Reviewer, Date Range, Target Search, Conflict Status)

export_button.check: Export PDF button visible and properly labeled
export_button.label: 📥 Export PDF

safety_strip.check: Safety strip present with correct message
safety_strip.text: Suggested changes only. Raw import rows are never changed.

table_visible.check: Audit log table visible with correct columns

table_columns.check: Table has exactly 6 columns in correct order

column_visibility_1440px.check: All columns visible without horizontal scroll at 1440px viewport

table_header_sticky.check: Table header has distinct styling and background

donor_history_content.check: Right sidebar shows reference ID and decision timeline

system_health_indicators.check: System health indicators displayed (Integrity Score, Review Velocity, Pending Conflicts, Anomalies)

footer_message.check: Footer message present with correct safety language
footer_message.text: All actions are logged to the audit trail. Suggested changes affect export staging only. Raw import rows are never changed from this screen.

donorTrust_v1_styling.check: DonorTrust v1 styling preserved (white/light gray background, subtle borders, readable typography)

no_master_id.details: All references use import row ID format (#P-99281-X)

no_master_database.details: All references use 'import batch' or 'export staging'

no_primary_donor.details: All references use import-scoped row identifiers

no_auto_verified.check: NO 'auto-verified' language present (except in status badge for clarity)
no_auto_verified.note: Only appears in status badge legend for clarity, not in descriptions

safe_language_marked_same_person.check: Safe language: 'marked as Same Person' used for duplicate identification
safe_language_marked_same_person.example: Alex Rivers marked as Same Person (#P-99281-X)

safe_language_marked_different.check: Safe language: 'marked as Different Person' available for distinction
safe_language_marked_different.details: Available in Action Type filter dropdown

safe_language_marked_deferred.check: Safe language: 'marked as Deferred' used for delayed decisions

safe_language_validation_pass.check: Safe language: 'marked validation pass' used for validation outcomes
safe_language_validation_pass.example: Jordan Smith marked validation pass for row (#P-77611-M)

safe_language_household_confirmed.check: Safe language: 'confirmed Household Link' used for household decisions
safe_language_household_confirmed.example: Taylor North confirmed Household Link for record (#H-29876-Q)

safe_language_household_rejected.check: Safe language: 'rejected Household Link' used for household rejections
safe_language_household_rejected.example: Morgan Lee rejected Household Link for record (#H-44102-B)

safe_language_ingested_batch.check: Safe language: 'ingested batch' used for system operations

safe_language_flagged.check: Safe language: 'flagged for' used for data quality flags
safe_language_flagged.example: Morgan Lee flagged for anomaly detection

import_scoped_targets.check: All targets use import row ID format (#P-99281-X, #H-44102-B, etc.)

raw_rows_immutable_message.check: Message present stating 'Raw import rows are never changed'

export_staging_message.check: Message present stating changes affect 'export staging only'

audit_log_entries.check: Audit log contains sample entries with all required fields

timestamps_format.check: Timestamps in ISO format with timezone

action_descriptions.check: Action descriptions are clear and import-scoped

notes_field.check: Notes field shows reviewer comments or system messages
notes_field.example: "Matching email and phone verified via internal database."

filters_functional.check: All filter controls are present and properly labeled

date_range_search.check: Date range filter includes options (Last 30 Days, Custom Range, etc.)

target_search.check: Target search box accepts import row ID format

conflict_status_filter.check: Conflict Status filter includes all badge types

pagination_present.check: Pagination controls show record count and page navigation

export_pdf_button.check: Export PDF button present and clickable
export_pdf_button.label: 📥 Export PDF

matches_spec_section_1.check: Audit Log aligns with spec core principle
matches_spec_section_1.details: Every reviewer action is logged with timestamp, actor, decision, and target. Raw import rows remain unchanged.

matches_spec_section_4.check: Audit log table matches specification columns

matches_spec_section_11.check: Visual design matches DonorTrust v1 styling

summary.notes: Local implementation-reference mock. Authority: audit_log-spec.md + design-reference.html. This is NOT a Stitch update.
